testcase.name: US-010 AC-7.1: happy path — synthesizes text, writes asset + cost_log > 1000-char text → TTS mock → publicUrl returned + asset written + cost_log written
US-010 AC-7.2: oversize — > 4000 chars rejects before OpenAI call > text.length > 4000 → BAD_REQUEST thrown · no OpenAI HTTP call
US-010 AC-7.2: oversize — > 4000 chars rejects before OpenAI call > exactly 4000 chars passes
US-010 AC-7.3: timeout — TTS API timeout → INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR > nock delays 500ms · worker timeout=100ms → INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
US-010 AC-7.4: rate-limit — 101st call per day → TOO_MANY_REQUESTS > Redis incr > 100 → TOO_MANY_REQUESTS with correct message
US-010 AC-7.4: rate-limit — 101st call per day → TOO_MANY_REQUESTS > 100th call (boundary) passes
US-010 AC-7.4: rate-limit — 101st call per day → TOO_MANY_REQUESTS > _todayKey format is correct
US-010 AC-7.5: API error — OpenAI 4xx/5xx → INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR > OpenAI 500 error → INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR thrown · no cost_log · no asset
US-010 AC-7.5: API error — OpenAI 4xx/5xx → INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR > OpenAI 429 rate limit error → INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR thrown
US-010 AC-8: TTS OpenAI integration — real TTS-1 call > short Chinese text → real TTS-1 → mp3 buffer + asset + cost_log written to DB
US-010 AC-9: R-001 — OPENAI_API_KEY not in frontend code > grep OPENAI_API_KEY apps/web should return 0 matches
